meaning: adj.又苦又甜的,苦乐参半的
examples: When teenagers grow up, they find childhood is a bittersweet (苦乐参半的) time.
But the memories aren't all bittersweet.
It is filled with mountain herbs essence and citrus and the finish is smooth and bittersweet.
But is hooking up -- and its sometimes bittersweet emotions -- just part of life?
